subject: Phase 3: Implement Make Noise module clones
description: 6 files covering all 28+ Make Noise modules: function generators (MATHS/etc), filters (QPAS/Optomix/etc), time processors (Mimeophon/Morphagene/etc), oscillators (DPO/STO/etc), sequencers (Rene/etc), utilities (modDemix/Wogglebug/etc).
